raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased XXXX XXXX ticket using Citi Card, i bought return journey ticket, while going to XXXX was fine but in return XXXX XXXX delayed entire journey by XXXX Hours. As per Department Of Transportation and FAA rule that if XXXX flight is delayed for more than XXXX hours then consumer is entitled to get refund. 

Also because of multiple delays i was forced to stay overnight at XXXX airport, XXXX customer care told me to book my hotel and cab, and was promised that airlines will pay be back, As of today XXXX has not paid me back and Citi bank is refusing to fight with XXXX XXXX and credit my amount back. 

Even though i have all the evidence and which i have submitted to both Citi Bank and XXXX XXXX, both of them are not responding to me in positive way. 

Citi Bank does not even look into what i have submitted and favoring XXXX XXXX. 
I have paid for extra leg room and extra bags for my entire journey, now airlines is refusing to refund me for not delivering the services that i paid for and Citi Bank is favoring vendor and not the customer of their bank
